llm_evidence_summary: Both A and B[0] are low-moisture part-skim shredded mozzarella cheese in an 8 oz bag/8 oz pack (shredded cheese form). Wegmans vs Great Value are both private-label brands and the specific product matches (mozzarella, part-skim, low-moisture, shredded). B[1] is sharp white cheddar block, a different cheese product, so it is not a match.

Both are frozen sliced strawberries with sugar (same product form) at 16 oz/16 ounce, and both are private-label store brands (Great Value vs Wegmans). Category aligns with frozen fruit/berries. Brand differs but private-label equivalence rules support matching same specific item and size.

Both products are sharp white cheddar cheese blocks at 8 oz (A: Great Value White Cheddar Cheese Block, Sharp, 8 oz; B: Wegmans Cheese, Cheddar, Sharp, White, 8 ounce). Different store brands are acceptable for private-label equivalence when the specific product and form match.

Both A and B[0] are tomato paste (same product type/form) with compatible per-unit size (A: 6 oz; B: 6 ounce) from private-label brands. B[1] is a different product (petite diced tomatoes), so it does not match.

A is Great Value Organic Tomato Sauce (15 oz per can, 4-pack) and B[0] is Wegmans Organic Tomato Sauce (15 oz). Both are private-label organic tomato sauce in the same form and size; multipack count differences are acceptable. B[1] is a different product (pasta).
B[0] is the same Jell-O Cook & Serve Vanilla Pudding & Pie Filling mix with matching 3 oz size and powder box form; only minor name/category wording differences.

Both A and B are frozen pearl onions in the same per-unit size (12 oz). Great Value and Wegmans are both store/private-label brands, and the product type/form matches (frozen pearl onions). Category differs at a higher level but does not indicate a different SKU.

CoverGirl/COVERGIRL alias brands. Same product type (pressed setting powder), same shade (Translucent Fair), and compatible size (0.39 oz). Category aligns to face makeup/makeup & nail care. Minor naming drift ('Mineral', trailing l1-4) does not indicate a different SKU.
Both are Black Box Malbec red wine in a large format box/bag style with the same 3 liter size. Brand/product align despite minor name drift (B omits 'Red Wine'/'3L Box').
